articles.title: How Ethereum Will 'Go Fast' Decentralized: Vitalik Demystifies the Surge
articles.description: Vitalik Buterin reminds proponents and detractors of the goal of the network's now-highly criticized rollup-centric roadmap

articles.title: Bitcoin accumulation fuels market uptick signaling potential surge in price
articles.description: Bitcoin’s recent market activity reveals significant shifts in demand and accumulation patterns among large holders, suggesting potential influences on its price trajectory. The top cryptocurrency’s price surged from around $40,000 in January 2024 to above $70,000 by March before retracing. It has recently begun to again threaten $70,000, coinciding with notable increases in apparent demand...

articles.title: Vitalik Buterin explains 3 ways Ethereum’s rollup-focused roadmap could resolve the trilemma
articles.description: Ethereum has been focused on scalability with The Merge as a major switch. Co-founder Vitalik Buterin has once again touched upon the topic, underlining that the roadmap is now rollup-centric. This means that Ethereum is not centered on just sharding and layer 2 protocols have a crucial role for the main layer. Achieving trustlessness and […]

articles.title: Binance Labs Invests in Bitcoin Staking Platform Lombard
articles.description: Binance Labs has invested about $1 million in Lombard Finance, the current largest Bitcoin liquid staking platform.

articles.title: Ethereum, L2s to reach over 100K TPS with ‘The Surge’ — Vitalik Buterin
articles.description: Some of the “key goals” of The Surge are to achieve over 100,000 TPS across Ethereum and its layer 2s and to increase interoperability, says Vitalik Buterin.
